case_title: CITY MODEL MANAGEMENT, INC. (SAL A. MARQUEZ JR.) VS RISTAROSE (LYNN ROSENZWEIG)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CITY MODEL MANAGEMENT, INC. (SAL A. MARQUEZ JR.) AS TO DEFENDANT RISTAROSE  (LYNN ROSENZWEIG) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
